title: Redden's Stone Lanterns
body:
![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef14f0515ca36f9b8719349cc2b897725e514da5.jpeg)
Another decoration mod, huh?

I couldn’t find some 1.18+ decorative mod with stone lanterns, so I spent two days learning to use MCreator to make a mod about stone lanterns. They are East Asian style.

Added Multi-block and single-block stone lanterns. You can right-click to switch whether to light up or not.

Added stone pillars. That can be changed to model and used to place lanterns. Of course, they can also be used for other purposes.

**This mod can be redistributed and used for any modpack, please enjoy it!!**

If you have any questions please reply in the Curesforge comment area.

All Blocks Preview:
![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3852449f5c3143b7e2fb64f0c6ba53062ed59fa1.jpeg)
